messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.





Now I will analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell framework as instructed by the report-analyzer skill. Based on my analysis of the document at `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584192108457906279Document_1.pdf`, here are the 8 structured insight records generated:



The skill has produced the following 8 analysis objects. I will now build the merged records and store each one in Cosmos DB.

---

**Storing Record 1 of 8 — Internal Notes (highlight)**

**Storing Record 2 of 8 — Internal Notes (note)****Storing Record 3 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (highlight)****Storing Record 4 of 8 — Understanding Your Results (note)****Storing Record 5 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (highlight)****Storing Record 6 of 8 — Priority Actions - Next 30 Days (note)****Storing Record 7 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (highlight)****Storing Record 8 of 8 — Long-Term Strategy (note)**

8 records saved successfully.

---

Now updating the original PatientDocument record.



Document updated successfully.
